name: smoque
description: Script-first smoke tests for real project behavior.
author: zsumz <shawn@zsumz.com>

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli/main.js run smoke/
scripts.smoke:examples: npm run build && node dist/cli/main.js run examples/runnable/
scripts.smoke:list: npm run build && node dist/cli/main.js list smoke/
scripts.coverage:check: npm run build && SMOQUE_COVERAGE_CHECK=1 vitest run --coverage
scripts.validate:compat: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run smoke:list && node dist/cli/main.js run smoke/ --skip-tag package && npm run smoke:examples && npm pack --dry-run --json
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run smoke:list && npm run smoke && npm run smoke:examples && npm pack --dry-run --json
